title: cupressus funebris subsp. tonkinensis
intro: Cupressus funebris subsp. tonkinensis, also known as the Chinese cypress or Tonkin cypress, is a coniferous evergreen tree native to southern China and northern Vietnam, classified as a subspecies of Cupressus funebris. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cupressus funebris subsp. tonkinensis include its ability to relieve fever, reduce pain and inflammation, and support respiratory health. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as tea and infusions, to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu.
